description: The observatory director has requested a formatted seismicity bulletin from the local SeisComP database for submission to the International Seismological Centre (ISC). Generate a bulletin for the full year 2024 (2024-01-01T00:00:00 to 2024-12-31T23:59:59) including all available phase arrivals and magnitudes, ensuring the Noto Peninsula earthquake details (origin time, coordinates, depth, and magnitude) are captured. Use the scbulletin tool (/home/ga/seiscomp/bin/scbulletin) with the database connection mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp and export the output to /home/ga/Desktop/noto_bulletin.txt.
